name: Cash Time Loans
description_short: Cash Time offers vehicle-collateral loans including title loans, registration loans, and title loan refinancing with loan amounts up to $100,000 and flexible repayment terms.
description_long:
Cash Time is a vehicle-based lending company that provides secured loans using automobiles as collateral. Based on their website content, they operate as a title loan lender serving customers who need quick access to cash. The company appears to have physical locations (in-store service mentioned) and operates in at least Arizona, with a primary phone number (602-512-3000) indicating Arizona presence.

Cash Time's primary offerings include Title Loans for vehicle owners with clear titles, Registration Loans (also called Personal Loans) for Arizona residents still making payments on their vehicles, and Title Loan buyouts that allow customers to refinance existing title loans from other lenders. They advertise loan amounts up to $100,000 based on vehicle value, with application options available online, in-person, or by phone. The company emphasizes fully amortized payments, flexible repayment schedules, and no prepayment penalties across their loan products.

What distinguishes Cash Time from traditional lenders is their focus on vehicle-secured lending as an alternative to unsecured personal loans. They market themselves as offering quick approval processes and simple application procedures. The company explicitly positions title loan refinancing (buyouts) as a debt management tool for customers struggling with high interest rates from competitors. Their product range extends beyond standard auto title loans to include registration loans for borrowers with existing auto loans and buyout services.

Cash Time operates in the subprime lending space, which carries inherent concerns. While the website emphasizes benefits and flexibility, title loans are typically high-interest products. The company does not disclose interest rates, APRs, or specific fee structures on the provided content, which is a significant transparency gap. Customers should carefully review all terms before borrowing, as vehicle-collateral loans carry the risk of repossession.
pros: Loan amounts up to $100,000 available based on vehicle value
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, and phone
No prepayment penalties—borrowers can pay off loans early without extra fees
Fully amortized payments mean principal and interest are paid down with each payment
Registration Loans available for Arizona residents still making car payments (not just clear-title owners)
Title loan refinancing/buyouts offered to help reduce rates from other lenders
Flexible repayment options and terms marketed as manageable
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or fees disclosed on website—critical pricing information withheld
Title loans are inherently high-risk for borrowers with risk of vehicle repossession if payments missed
Registration Loan product appears limited to Arizona residents only
Website content lacks transparency about loan terms, typical approval timelines, or required credit scores
No information provided about what happens if a borrower defaults or cannot repay
best_for: Vehicle owners with clear titles who need emergency cash quickly and can afford high-interest debt
Arizona residents with existing auto loans who need supplemental cash and want a secured alternative to unsecured personal loans
Borrowers with existing title loans from other lenders seeking to refinance at potentially better rates
People with poor credit who may not qualify for traditional personal loans but own a vehicle
diagnosis: Cash Time is best for Arizona residents who own a vehicle and need emergency cash quickly but lack access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that title loans are high-interest products with vehicle repossession risk, and the company provides no APR or rate transparency on their website, making it impossible to assess true cost before contacting them directly.
services: Title Loans for vehicle owners with clear titles
Registration Loans/Personal Loans for borrowers still making car payments
Title Loan Buyouts (refinancing existing title loans from other lenders)
Loans on cars, trucks, SUVs, motorcycles, RVs, ATVs, and commercial vehicles
In-store application and approval at physical locations
Early payoff options with no prepayment penalties
Loan amounts up to $100,000 based on vehicle value
